reviews.comment:
Es una Estación bastante completa para para a comprar algo rico y estirar las piernas del viaje. Los baños están limpios y cuidados. Un poco caro todo lo que venden, podrían mejorar en los precios

(Translated by Google)
It's a fairly complete station, a good place to stop and buy something tasty and stretch your legs after your journey. The restrooms are clean and well-maintained. Everything they sell is a bit pricey; they could improve their pricing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXcjc3dEp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Un lugar tradicional para parar al regreso de la costa muy buena atención y variedad de comidas tiene un parque atrás que estaba un poco descuidado la última vez que pase baños limpios y bien cuidados adentro tiene un puesto de venta de quesos y productos regionales muy buenos

(Translated by Google)
A traditional place to stop on the way back from the coast, very good service and a variety of food. It has a park in the back that was a bit neglected the last time I was there. The restrooms are clean and well-maintained. Inside, there's a stall selling very good cheeses and regional products.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXcjdiTGFnEAE
